page_metadata.biotools__summary: NetAllergen-1.0 is a predictive model based on the random forest algorithm. It incorporates novel MHC class II presentation propensity features to improve the allergenicity prediction.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: NetAllergen-1.0 is a predictive model based on the random forest algorithm. It incorporates novel MHC class II presentation propensity features to improve the allergenicity prediction.
